HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

OFF CALENDAR per request of the Plaintiff. Defendant has provided documents to the Plaintiff proving levied funds from the bank levy are exempt. Email dated 5/8/19.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
